Our team is committed to making SeaSketc: E whakapau kaha ana tā mātou tīma ki te whakarite kia wātea a SeaSketch ki ngā kaiwhakamahi katoa, tae atu ki te hunga hauā. E whai ana mātou ki te whai i ngā Aratohu Whakamārama Ihirangi Tukutuku (WCAG) kia pai ai te wheako, inā koa mō te whakatere papapātuhi me te whakamahinga whānui. Ahakoa e mahi tonu ana mātou ki te whakapai ake i te wātea, e mihi ana mātou ki ngā urupare mai i ō mātou kaiwhakamahi. Mēnā he raruraru āu, he whakaaro rānei, whakapā mai ki a mātou i <2>accessibility@seasketch.org</2>.
We conducted a comprehensive review of t: I whakahaerehia e mātou he arotake whānui o te atanga SeaSketch hei whakapai ake i te urunga atu. Inaianei ka taea e ngā kaiwhakamahi te whakatere katoa i ngā mahere turanga, ngā paparanga paparua, me ngā wānanga kōrero mā te whakamahi i te tāuru papapātuhi anake. Hei tāpiri, kua whakatinanahia e mātou he maha ngā āhuatanga ARIA hei whakapai ake i te hototahitanga ki ngā kaipānui mata me ētahi atu hangarau āwhina, kia pai ake ai te wheako mō ngā kaiwhakamahi katoa.
